description:
CrowdStrike (Nasdaq: CRWD), a global cybersecurity leader, has redefined modern security with the world’s most advanced cloud-native platform for protecting critical areas of enterprise risk — endpoints and cloud workloads, identity and data.

Powered by the CrowdStrike Security Cloud and world-class AI, the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform leverages real-time indicators of attack, threat intelligence, evolving adversary tradecraft and enriched telemetry from across the enterprise to deliver hyper-accurate detections, automated protection and remediation, elite threat hunting and prioritized observability of vulnerabilities.

Purpose-built in the cloud with a single lightweight-agent architecture, the Falcon platform delivers rapid and scalable deployment, superior protection and performance, reduced complexity and immediate time-to-value.

CrowdStrike: We stop breaches.
description_enriched: Reflexology is a company that offers specialist reflexology treatments designed to calm both mind and body, encourage your body's natural healing, restore balance, and support you through lives challenges from fertility and pregnancy to stress, anxiety, and hormonal imbalance. Each treatment is tailored to support your specific health concerns and current goals.
description_metadata_raw: CrowdStrike is a global cybersecurity leader with an advanced cloud-native platform for protecting endpoints, cloud workloads, identities and data.

Acceleration is back. Q3 was a record-breaking CrowdStrike quarter.

We secure AI from development to adoption, from LLM to agent, and from device to cloud.

In Q3, we delivered, cementing our position as the operating system of cybersecurity. Highlights include:

🚀 Record financial performance: We achieved record Q3 Net New ARR of $265M, accelerating to 73% growth YoY. We delivered all-time record operating income of $265M and record Q3 free cash flow of $296M, 24% of revenue.

🔄 Falcon Flex is winning: Flex is changing how the industry buys security. Ending ARR from Flex accounts surpassed $1.35 billion, growing more than 200% YoY. 

☁️ Platform consolidation is here: We delivered broad-based acceleration across Cloud, Next-Gen Identity, Next-Gen SIEM collectively - and acceleration in our endpoint business. Organizations are standardizing on Falcon.

Thank you to our customers, partners, and CrowdStrikers for your trust and dedication to our mission of stopping breaches. The world’s adoption of AI requires cybersecurity. Now more than ever, synonymous with that, CrowdStrike is a necessity.

See our full earnings release and presentation here: https://lnkd.in/gF4SmpFR

🚨 New Zero-Day Targeting Oracle E-Business Suite

CrowdStrike has identified a mass exploitation campaign leveraging a novel zero-day vulnerability (CVE-2025-61882) in Oracle E-Business Suite, used for data exfiltration and remote code execution.

Activity is likely linked to GRACEFUL SPIDER is likely involved in this campaign, though multiple threat actors may be exploiting the flaw following Oracle’s October 3 disclosure and CVE-2025-61882 patch release.

🔍 Read our full analysis: https://lnkd.in/gy-FpXNU

company_updates.reshared_post_description:
“There's two reasons why we're building Nemotron. The first is because it helps us build the GPUs and systems for the future.”

The second reason is because trust is the foundation of impactful AI–and it starts with understanding. That’s why Nemotron was built open source at its core—so developers, researchers, and enterprises can build together.

Hear from Bryan Catanzaro, VP of Applied Deep Learning Research at NVIDIA, on why making AI open benefits everyone.

👉 https://nvda.ws/4pCUT8P

CrowdStrike’s Q2 was all about reacceleration - we delivered record Q2 net new ARR. More than 1,000 Flex customers have consolidated on Falcon at-scale, and nearly 10% have already Re-Flexed, growing their CrowdStrike commitment. 

With more than $1.56B in innovation solutions ending ARR, the Falcon platform is our growth engine:

▪️ We are the operating system of cybersecurity: Next-Gen SIEM ending ARR was >$430M, growing >95% YoY
▪️ We secure human and agentic identities, everywhere: Next-Gen Identity ending ARR was >$435M, growing >21% YoY
▪️ We secure AI’s foundation, the cloud: Falcon Cloud Security’s ending ARR was >$700M, growing >35% YoY  
 
Today, we announced our intent to acquire Onum, which we believe will accelerate security and IT data migration into Falcon. Bringing detection even closer to the data source, contextualizing and filtering data in realtime, and supercharging security/IT operations paves the way to the agentic SOC.
 
We are security’s operating system for the AI era. As the threat landscape continues evolving, CrowdStrike continues staying ahead. Thank you to our customers, partners, and team for your ongoing trust. The mission continues: we stop breaches - at the speed of AI. 
 
See our earnings release and earnings presentation available at https://lnkd.in/grNBmjb9.

🆕 CrowdStrike is acquiring Onum to supercharge autonomous cybersecurity with real-time data pipelines.

If Falcon SIEM is the engine of the modern SOC, Onum is both the pipeline + filter — streaming high-quality, filtered fuel quickly into the engine to drive more efficient and superior performance. 

Onum delivers transformational advantages across three critical dimensions:

⚡ Speed: Delivers 5X more events per second than its nearest competitor and processes security and observability data in real-time versus legacy batch and store methods.

⚡ Cost: Smart filtering reduces data storage costs by 50% through intelligent optimization.

⚡ Superior Outcomes: Real-time pipeline detection starts before data enters the Falcon platform, delivering up to 70% faster incident response with 40% less ingestion overhead.

The future of cybersecurity is here – built on real-time, high-fidelity data.

👉 Learn more: https://lnkd.in/gmZemfYX

🎯 Identity-based threats

📅 Aug 6, 2:35 PM
📍 Mandalay Bay 

See our full #BHUSA agenda here: https://lnkd.in/gfMex_cF

⚠️ On July 18, an unknown adversary compromised five popular NPM packages to deliver a new multi-stage infostealer dubbed Scavenger.

📦 The attack began with stolen maintainer credentials and poisoned NPM packages containing malicious install scripts and DLLs.

🛡️ The CrowdStrike Falcon platform prevented the attack, detecting and quarantining the Scavenger DLL and blocking malicious behavior like the rundll32.exe execution chain before any damage was done.

🚨 CVE-2025-54313 has been assigned to the most widely used package in this campaign with a High severity rating. Clean versions are now available, but the supply chain risks remain.

Our latest blog details the full attack chain, IOCs, and how Falcon stops supply chain threats before they spread.

Read the full post: https://lnkd.in/gZcniiFz
